---
title: "Research"
listing:
  contents:
    - "posts/model-strategies/*.ipynb"
    - "posts/educational/tutorials/*.ipynb"
    - "posts/educational/related-topics/*.ipynb"
    - "posts/project-infrastructure/*.ipynb"
    - "posts/exploratory-data-analysis/*.ipynb"
    - "posts/model-strategies/*.qmd"
    - "posts/educational/tutorials/*.qmd"
    - "posts/educational/related-topics/*.qmd"
    - "posts/project-infrastructure/*.qmd"
    - "posts/exploratory-data-analysis/*.qmd"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  feed: true
  image-placeholder: "assets/research-placeholder-pencil.png"
page-layout: full
---

This page collects reproducible explorations for the TimeAnalysis project.
Each card is generated automatically from a Jupyter notebook or Quarto post
committed to one of the research section folders.

## Sections

- [Models & Strategies](model-strategies.qmd) - trading strategy and model research.
- [Educational](educational.qmd) - tutorials and adjacent learning topics.
- [Project Infrastructure](project-infrastructure.qmd) - runtime checks, UML, UI, and service documentation.
- [Exploratory Data Analysis](exploratory-data-analysis.qmd) - data properties and feature exploration.
